metadata.title: Roomies
metadata.description: Gamified chores and shared expenses for roommates

auth.signInDescription: Sign in to your Roomies account
auth.signUpDescription: Create your account to manage chores and expenses with roommates
auth.checkEmailDescription: We sent a confirmation link to {email}. Open it to activate your account, then sign in.
auth.emailNotConfirmed: Please confirm your email using the link we sent, then try signing in again.
auth.confirmedSuccess: Email confirmed. You can sign in now.
auth.authCallbackError: Confirmation link is invalid or expired. Sign up again to request a new link.
auth.betaUserLimitFull: Beta is full — we've reached the maximum of 50 users. Check back later or sign in if you already have an account.
auth.betaUserLimitError: Beta is full — we've reached the maximum of 50 users.

onboarding.shareInvite: Share this invite code with your roommates
onboarding.createOrJoin: Create a new house or join one with an invite code
onboarding.betaHouseLimitFull: Beta is full — we've reached the maximum of 10 houses. New houses and invite joins are paused. Ask an existing house admin for an invite once a slot opens, or contact the team.
onboarding.betaHouseLimitError: Beta is full — we've reached the maximum of 10 houses.

dashboard.leaderLeading: {name} is currently leading the pack with stellar household contributions.
dashboard.leaderDefault: See who is leading the house this week.
dashboard.noLeaderboard: No roommates on the board yet.
dashboard.logExpenseDesc: Split groceries, bills, or rent with everyone.
dashboard.allCaughtUp: All caught up! Check back for new tasks.
dashboard.addShoppingDesc: Log something you bought — price splits equally with everyone.
dashboard.noRecentActivity: No recent activity yet. Complete a chore, add to the list, or log an expense.
dashboard.installAppDescription: Add Roomies to your home screen for a full-screen app experience on your phone.
dashboard.installAppIosSteps: On iPhone or iPad: tap Share, then choose “Add to Home Screen”.
dashboard.installAppAndroidSteps: In Chrome: tap the menu (⋮), then choose “Install app” or “Add to Home screen”.
dashboard.installAppDesktopHint: Open this site on your phone’s browser to install it to your home screen.
dashboard.buyCoffeeDesc: Support Roomies with a tip via InstaPay.
dashboard.buyCoffeeQrPitch: Roomies is free — no ads, no paywalls. We built it for real shared homes, and every tip helps us ship fixes, new features, and keep the lights on. If Roomies saved you a fight over bills or chores, a coffee is a huge thank-you.
dashboard.buyCoffeeQrSubtitle: Scan to send a tip via InstaPay.
dashboard.buyCoffeeQrHint: Scan with your phone camera or banking app.
dashboard.buyCoffeeMobileSubtitle: Tap below to open InstaPay and send a tip.
dashboard.buyCoffeeMobileHint: Opens in your browser or banking app.

shopping.splitSolo: Only you in the house — no split needed.

shoppingList.title: Shopping List
shoppingList.subtitle: Add items the house needs. When someone buys one, pick it from the list on the dashboard.
shoppingList.empty: Nothing on the list yet. Add items your house needs.

chores.hubSubtitle: Keep the house happy, earn XP, and unlock rewards!
chores.pendingCount: {count, plural, one {# chore pending} other {# chores pending}}
chores.noActiveAdmin: No active chores. Tap Log Chore to add one.
chores.noActiveMember: No active chores. Ask your admin to add chores.
chores.pendingApprovalsCount: {count, plural, one {# submission to review} other {# submissions to review}}
chores.approveConfirm: Approve this completion? The member will receive {xp} XP.
chores.rejectConfirm: Reject this completion? The chore will stay active for the member to try again.
chores.reopenChoreConfirm: Reopen this chore? The XP awarded on completion will be removed from the member who earned it.
chores.xpEditCompletedHint: XP reward changes do not adjust XP already awarded for this completion.
chores.rotateAssignmentHint: After each cycle, the next roommate is assigned automatically (by username order).
chores.recurrenceUtcHint: Recurring chores return on calendar dates at midnight UTC.
chores.rewardsCta: Spend XP on house perks and fun privileges.

rewards.title: Rewards Shop
rewards.subtitle: Redeem your hard-earned XP for house perks everyone agrees to honor.
rewards.noRedemptions: No redemptions yet — be the first to claim a perk!
rewards.djCleanupDesc: You pick the playlist for the next group cleanup session.
rewards.pickFridayMovieDesc: Total control over the popcorn and the film choice.
rewards.comfyCouchWeekendDesc: Claim the best couch spot for the whole weekend.
rewards.deliveryPickDesc: When the house orders in, everyone eats from your restaurant choice.
rewards.vetoChoreAssignmentDesc: Pass a single assigned chore to another roommate.
rewards.skipDishDutyDesc: Pass your turn at the sink to another roommate.
rewards.trashImmunityWeekDesc: Skip trash duty for one full week.
rewards.confirmDisablePreset: Hide this preset from the shop? You can show it again later.
rewards.noRewardsAvailable: No rewards in the shop yet. House admins can add perks under Manage rewards.

ledger.netPositive: You're owed more than you owe.
ledger.netNegative: You owe more than you're owed.
ledger.settleAllConfirm: Confirm you received payment for all outstanding debts owed to you?
ledger.soloHouseHint: Invite a roommate to start splitting expenses and tracking balances.
ledger.soloHouseMatrixHint: Balances appear once another roommate joins your house.
ledger.soloHouseAddHint: Saved for your records. Splits apply when roommates join.
ledger.splitMustEqualTotal: Shares must add up to the total amount
ledger.remindMembersConfirm: Send a payment reminder to {count, plural, one {# roommate} other {# roommates}}?
ledger.remindSuccess: Reminder sent to {count, plural, one {# roommate} other {# roommates}}.
ledger.remindPartial: Sent to {sent}; {skipped} already reminded in the last 24 hours.
ledger.remindAllOnCooldown: You can remind again in 24 hours.
ledger.noDebtorsToRemind: No one currently owes you money.
ledger.allRemindersOnCooldown: All roommates were already reminded in the last 24 hours.

vault.subtitle: Your house command center — Wi‑Fi, codes, bills, contacts, and rules in one place.
vault.wifiEmpty: Wi‑Fi details haven't been added yet.
vault.wifiEmptyAdmin: Add your Wi‑Fi so roommates can connect easily.
vault.wifiQrHint: Scan with your phone camera to join the network.
vault.codesEmptyAdmin: Add door or gate codes for the house.
vault.fixedBillsEmptyAdmin: Add recurring bills so everyone knows what to pay each month.
vault.rulesEmpty: House rules haven't been set yet.

profile.title: Profile
profile.subtitle: Your account, progress, and house membership.
profile.noActivity: No contributions yet. Complete a chore or log an expense.
profile.houseAdminDesc: Manage house settings and approve chores
profile.pushUnsupported: Push notifications are not supported in this browser.
profile.pushPermissionDenied: Notification permission was denied. Enable it in your browser or device settings.
profile.pushIosInstallHint: On iPhone, add Roomies to your Home Screen first, then enable push notifications here.
profile.pushSubscribeFailed: Could not enable push notifications. Try again.
profile.pushVapidMissing: Push is not configured on the server. Restart the dev server after adding VAPID keys to .env.local.
profile.leaveConfirm: Leave this house? You can join again with an invite code.
profile.leaveAdminHint: Transfer admin role before leaving as the only admin.
profile.usernameTaken: Username is already taken in this house
profile.usernameMin: Username must be at least 2 characters
profile.usernameMax: Username must be at most 24 characters

settings.title: House Settings
settings.adminSubtitle: Manage your house, invite code, and roommates.
settings.memberSubtitle: View house info. Contact an admin to make changes.
settings.removeConfirm: Remove this roommate from the house?
settings.transferConfirm: Transfer admin role to this roommate? You will become a member.

system.title: System
system.subtitle: Platform usage & health
system.pageDescription: Aggregate stats across all houses and users. Data is platform-wide and only visible to system admins.
system.loadError: Could not load system stats. Run the latest database migration and ensure your account is in system_admins.

sections.limitsHint: Platform caps for the current test period.
sections.usageHint: Chores, expenses, debts, notifications, and rewards across the platform.

topHouses.title: Top houses by activity
topHouses.description: Houses with the most logged expenses.
topHouses.name: House

errors.splitSharesRequired: Enter a share for each roommate
errors.splitInvalidShare: Enter a valid amount for each share
errors.splitMustEqualTotal: Shares must add up to the total amount
errors.adminOnly: Only house admins can do this
errors.nothingToSettle: Nothing to settle — only the person owed can confirm payment
